summary: Confirm every rx-demo image needed by the k3s-demo overlay exists in the local swarm registry.
command: for repo in rx-ui api-gateway legacy-sync-worker read-model-projection loadgen; do curl -fsS "http://swarm1.lab.auzietek.com:5001/v2/rx-demo/${repo}/tags/list" | grep -F '097889a'; done
expected: All five application images have tag 097889a in the registry.
